EasySaveDocs
Table of Contents

Class FileManager

Namespace
CryptoSoft
Assembly
CryptoSoft.dll

Provides logic for file encryption and decryption using XOR operations. Ensures single-instance execution across the system using a global Mutex.

public class FileManager
Inheritance
object
FileManager
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Examples

Usage example:

if (FileManager.IsSingleInstance)
{
    // This is the only instance, proceed with encryption
    double timeTaken = FileManager.CryptFile("path/to/source.txt", "path/to/dest.txt", "encryptionKey");
    Console.WriteLine($"File encrypted in {timeTaken} ms");
}
else
{
    // Another instance is already running, wait for it to finish
    Console.WriteLine("Another instance is running. Waiting...");
    FileManager.WaitForInstance();
    Console.WriteLine("Previous instance finished. You can now run the encryption.");
}

Properties

IsSingleInstance

Gets a value indicating whether this process is the only instance (true), or if another instance already holds the encryption mutex (false).

public static bool IsSingleInstance { get; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

CryptFile(string, string, string)

Encrypts (or decrypts) a source file and writes the result to a destination path using an XOR cipher.

public static double CryptFile(string sourcePath, string destPath, string key)

Parameters

sourcePath string

The absolute or relative path to the file to be encrypted.

destPath string

The absolute or relative path where the encrypted file will be saved.

key string

The encryption key used for the XOR operation.

Returns

double

The time taken to complete the encryption process in milliseconds. Returns -1 if the source file does not exist.

ReleaseInstance()

Releases the global mutex if this process created and owns it. Note: This is optional as the mutex will be automatically released upon process exit.

public static void ReleaseInstance()

WaitForInstance()

Blocks the current thread and waits until the global mutex is released by another running instance.

public static void WaitForInstance()
